description.plain: Nucleofill Strong is an anti-aging injectable designed for skin renewal and bio-restructuring, using polynucleotides to improve skin concerns, especially in mature, dry, or lackluster skin, offering lifting, antioxidant, and moisturizing benefits. What it is: Nucleofill Strong is a polynucleotide-based injectable designed to rejuvenate and revitalize the skin. How it works: Polynucleotides: These stimulate cell renewal, leading to improved skin texture and elasticity. Antioxidant Action: It helps protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals. Hydration: Polynucleotides bind to water, providing long-term hydration and improving skin firmness. Benefits: Improves skin hydration, texture, and elasticity. Reduces the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Addresses dull, grey complexion and other skin concerns. Can be used to address scars and stretch marks. Offers lifting and antioxidant benefits. Ideal for: Mature, dry, or lacklustre skin. Skin subject to oxidative stress. Dehydrated skin. Stretch marks and scars. Treatment: A course of 2-4 sessions spaced 2-4 weeks apart is recommended for optimal results. Results can last up to 12 months.

description.plain: Syringe 1 x 1,5ml Nucleofill Strong works as an anti-aging treatment. It is a highly effective biostimulant gel based on natural polynucleotides and high viscosity that deeply regenerates and intervenes in skin bio-restructuring. Nucleofill Strong reduces facial wrinkles and has lifting effects due to its antioxidants and moisturizing qualities. It leaves the skin rejuvenated and protected and provides long-lasting results. This product is great for dry skin or skin damaged by oxidative stress. Furthermore, it can bring significant improvement to the skin’s appearance and treat stretch marks. description.plain: Nucleofill 25 (Strong) is a bio stimulant gel based on natural polynucleotides and high viscosity for skin rejuvenation and protection. As an anti-ageing treatment. Nucleofill is designed to improve skin elasticity and tightness as well as aid in the prevention of wrinkles. Nucleofill 25 is the new line of natural polynucleotide-based bio stimulating gels, with a high viscosity, for protecting and rejuvenating the skin. It’s recommended to have 2 treatments with 2-4 weeks in between each session, in severe cases you can have up to 4 treatments with 2-4 weeks intervals. The product contains high molecular weight polynucleotide chains whose biochemical peculiarities make it highly viscoelastic and capable of binding and orient in space a considerable amount of water molecules, which are primarily retained in the hydrophilic groups level of phosphorylated sugars of the individual nucleotides. The strong moisturising ability is mainly due to the water retention capabilities of the hydrophilic groups of the phosphorylated sugars of the single nucleotides. An “electrostatic sponge” able to guarantee cellular well-being by conferring deep hydration to tissues. Free radical scavenger effect – The polymeric macromolecules are able to also play an immediate “scavenger” action against free radicals. This effect of this polynucleotide gel is possible thanks to the chemical structure capable of blocking free radicals in the nitrogenous ring. Moreover, the progressive degradation of polynucleotide molecules by enzymes present in the extracellular environment, free metabolites which, in turn, accentuate the protection activity against free radicals. The biostimulating effect is given both by the presence of nucleoside structures capable of activating cell membrane receptors, and by metabolites that are produced by the enzymatic attack during the degradation process. A slow and continuous effect. By promoting the metabolic activity of the fibroblastic cells, polynucleotides collaborate to reintegrate into the dermis various fundamental autologous components (glucoseaminoglycans, proteins, glycoproteins, fibrils, etc.) tending to maintain their physiological functionality. Their repeated administration over time, determines: – a protracted isosmotic hydration of the dermal matrix – an anti-radical action Both of these effects combine to recreate in the dermal matrix the most favourable physiological conditions for the regeneration and metabolic activity of fibroblasts, with long-lasting biorevitalising effects. Polynucleotides activate two types of membrane receptors in fibroblasts, or rather Receptor CD39 and Receptor CD40. The activation of these receptors lead to two effects: stimulation of type I collagen production, saturation of fibroblasts in myofibroblasts Contains: 25mg/ml of polynucleotides The synergy of 4 types of stimulation: – Skin regeneration – Cleansing effect on the cells by increasing circulation and removing  free radicals – Deep moisturising effect – Firming and contouring Indications: – Loose skin with poor circulation – Dehydrated skin – Skin submitted to oxidative stress – Stretch marks – Scars – For those who want firming and contouring, more definition – Bio-stimulation and increase in collagen type 1.

description.plain: Nucleofill Strong is een polynucleotide biostimulator van Promoitalia Group, ontwikkeld voor intensieve huidrevitalisatie en celregeneratie bij uitgesproken huidveroudering. De hoge PN-concentratie in 1,5 ml stimuleert fibroblasten, bevordert de collageenproductie en verbetert de huidkwaliteit op cellulair niveau. Productspecificaties Inhoud 1 × 1,5 ml voorgevulde spuit Werkzame stof Polynucleotiden (PN) – hoge concentratie Fabrikant Promoitalia Group, Italië Certificering CE klasse III medisch hulpmiddel Injectiediepte Intradermaal Bewaring 2°C – 8°C, niet invriezen Gebruik Uitsluitend voor professioneel medisch-esthetisch gebruik Indicaties Uitgesproken huidveroudering Intensieve huidrevitalisatie en celregeneratie Gezicht, hals en décolleté Klinische voordelen Hoge PN-concentratie – krachtige biostimulatie Fibroblaststimulatie – collageenherstel op cellulair niveau Resultaat – zichtbaar na 2-3 sessies Vergelijking binnen de Nucleofill-lijn Nucleofill Soft Plus Eyes – voor periorbital zone Nucleofill Strong (1,5 ml) – krachtige biostimulatie Nucleofill Strong Plus (2 ml) – versterkte formule, grotere volume Dit product is uitsluitend bestemd voor artsen en schoonheidsspecialisten met een opleiding esthetische geneeskunde.

description.plain: Nucleofill Strong 1,5ml, formerly known as Nucleofill 25, is an advanced biostimulatory treatment by Promoitalia, designed to deeply rejuvenate and restructure the skin. Unlike traditional fillers, it uses a 2.5% polynucleotide formula to stimulate collagen production, improve elasticity, and provide deep hydration. Its antioxidant and lifting effects help combat aging, oxidative stress, and dehydration, restoring skin’s firmness and radiance without adding volume.
